summary: LIVE PRODUCTION TEST on https://krexion.com — Successfully reproduced the RUT 'DB doc missing' bug exactly as expected. Logged in as aadspower301@gmail.com, navigated to Real User Traffic, configured a job with target01 link + ProxyJet Auto (US) + TikTok Mix (Android+iOS) UAs + saved data file 'test_data_1782397855' (946 rows) + form-fill enabled + skip-captcha + self-heal + total_clicks=3 + concurrency=1 + watchdog=600s, clicked 'Send 3 Real Visits with Auto-Fill', and within ~10s the job transitioned to status='failed' with the EXACT error message: 'Selected data-file upload not found · DB doc missing (re-upload required)'. The 'Retry this job' button is visible. Note: dashboard confirms 'PC connected' (31.9 GB / 8 cores) + 'Cloud (light) mode' banner, confirming the heavy-block bridge path is the active code path. Note 2: the saved-automation-JSON ('target 750 v10 (E1-fixed)') selector was not exposed in the visible RUT form UI under '🧩 Use Custom Automation JSON' (which is a per-job manual textarea, not a saved-templates picker); job ran without explicit automation_json — but the data-file failure surfaces FIRST in the prepare phase regardless of automation_json, so this does not affect bug reproduction.

integration_issues.flow: RUT job creation → backend prepare → bridge to desktop PC
integration_issues.issue: Cloud `_inline_upload_refs` does NOT inline the saved data_file payload for bridged heavy jobs. When job lands on user's desktop, the desktop process looks for the upload by id in its OWN local DB, doesn't find it (because it was uploaded via cloud), and the prepare-step diagnostic at server.py:~7383 emits 'Selected data-file upload not found · DB doc missing (re-upload required)' → job marked failed. This is EXPECTED right now (fix staged in /app but NOT deployed to VPS). Reproduced live on production with job 'Send 3 Real Visits with Auto-Fill'.

/tmp/krexion_screenshots/krexion_test_13_final.jpeg (★ KEY SCREENSHOT — 'Live Run failed' badge + 'Job failed: Selected data-file upload not found · DB doc missing (re-upload required)' + 'Retry this job' button — exactly the error message the user has been seeing)
action_items: Main agent: deploy the staged fix from /app/backend/server.py:~542 `_inline_upload_refs` (which currently does NOT inline data_file for bridged jobs) to the production VPS at krexion.com. Verify the function inlines the binary data_file content/base64 into the bridge payload BEFORE handing off to the desktop heartbeat. After deploy, re-run this exact scenario — the same job should pass the prepare-phase data-file check and progress beyond 'Starting...' into actual visit execution.

Recommend adding a sanity check in `_rut_prepare_and_run` (server.py:~7383) that emits a more descriptive error including the data_file_id that was searched for, so future occurrences are debuggable from the user-visible message alone.

Consider gating STRICT_CLOUD_HEAVY_BLOCK=true behind a feature flag so that, until the inlining fix is fully verified, the cloud can locally fall back to running the prepare phase + serve the data file to the desktop via signed URL instead of relying on the desktop to look up by id.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:~542 `_inline_upload_refs` — must inline saved data_file (and any other upload refs: ua_batch, proxy_batch, automation_json, target_screenshot) into the bridge payload. Currently it appears to skip data_file. This is the root cause.
server.py:~7383 `_rut_prepare_and_run` — error message is correct & user-visible, but should include the offending upload_id for support diagnostics.

Frontend RUT page does NOT expose a 'Saved automation JSON' picker (only a manual textarea under 🧩 Use Custom Automation JSON). If saved-automation-JSON templates are a supported product feature, the picker is missing from the RUT form — flag for product.

success_rate.backend: n/a (read-only frontend test on live prod)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — login, navigation, full RUT form configuration, job submission, and failure-state capture all completed successfully

seed_data_creation: None. Used user's existing saved resources only: target01 link (315d9b7f...), TikTok Mix UA batch (2d96a3dd...), saved data file test_data_1782397855 (290b5f9a...). No data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent deploys the `_inline_upload_refs` fix to production VPS, re-run the SAME flow (login → RUT → target01 + ProxyJet US Auto + TikTok Mix UA + test_data_1782397855 + form-fill ON + skip-captcha + self-heal + clicks=3 + concurrency=1 + watchdog=600 → Start). Expected behavior post-fix: job should NOT fail with 'DB doc missing'; instead it should either (a) progress to 'preparing → running' and start streaming visit logs (Live Run with RECENT VISITS populating), or (b) fail with a different downstream error (proxy / form-fill mismatch / etc) — not the DB doc missing one. The smoke-test prefix ('Starting smoke test...' / 'Starting...') is normal — actual job ID and live trace appear once preparation passes. Same testids confirmed working: rut-link-select, rut-use-proxyjet-auto, rut-proxyjet-country, rut-ua-option-<id>, rut-total-clicks, rut-concurrency, rut-stuck-watchdog-seconds, rut-form-fill-toggle, rut-upload-data-id, rut-skip-captcha, rut-self-heal, rut-start-btn, rut-follow-redirect.

steps_to_reproduce: 2. Verify dashboard shows 'PC connected' badge + 'Cloud (light) mode' banner (this triggers heavy-job bridging to desktop).
3. Go to Real User Traffic → Select link 'target01' → Enable ProxyJet Auto Mode (Country=US, State=Any).
4. Select saved UA batch 'TikTok Mix (Android+iOS) - RUT test'.
6. Toggle Form Filler ON → from 'Or pick a saved file from Uploaded Things' dropdown pick 'test_data_1782397855 · 946 rows · data.xlsx'. Skip-captcha and Self-heal stay ON by default.
7. Click 'Send 3 Real Visits with Auto-Fill' button.
8. Within ~10–15 seconds Live Run panel appears with red 'failed' badge and message 'Job failed — Selected data-file upload not found · DB doc missing (re-upload required)'. Retry button shown.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Cloud-side `_inline_upload_refs` does not inline the saved data_file binary/payload into the bridge envelope sent to the user's desktop. The desktop process therefore receives only an upload_id reference and looks for it in its OWN local DB → not found → prepare phase emits 'DB doc missing' and marks the job failed at server.py line ~7383.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation_until_deploy: User can keep retrying — outcome will not change. No client-side workaround. Awaiting production deploy of the staged fix.
